protocol_notes: Gets 10mg vials reconstituted with 2mL BAC water, purchases 2 vials at a time. Recommends bare minimum 4 weeks, average 8+ weeks. States 500mcg is standard dosing done as 250mcg 2x daily with no days off. Notes that 5mg vial is only 10 days at 500mcg/day or 20 days at 250mcg/day. Advises against blends due to inability to isolate reactions; notes copper peptide usually starts at 1mg daily but causes need to scale other compounds alongside it.
